programs.name: Marathon Strength Prep
programs.description: 8-week periodized strength program timed around Sarah's April marathon. Weeks 1–4 build peak unilateral strength, Weeks 5–6 taper into race day, Weeks 7–8 manage recovery and reintroduce bilateral training.

program_json.summary: A marathon-aligned strength program that peaks Sarah's single-leg power and hip stability heading into race day in April 2026, then manages her return to full training volume post-race. Emphasis on IT band protection, glute activation, and unilateral strength throughout.

sessions.label: Week 1 Day A
sessions.focus: Hip abductor activation and single-leg RDL baseline

sessions.label: Week 1 Day B
sessions.focus: Split squat introduction and cable hip abduction volume

sessions.label: Week 2 Day A
sessions.focus: Single-leg RDL load progression + step-up introduction

sessions.label: Week 2 Day B
sessions.focus: Bulgarian split squat introduction — form and light load

weeks.theme: Plyometric Introduction — lateral hops and bounding

sessions.label: Week 3 Day A
sessions.focus: Load progression across all unilateral patterns

sessions.label: Week 3 Day B
sessions.focus: Lateral hop introduction + single-leg strength consolidation

weeks.theme: Power Prep — peak strength before marathon taper

sessions.label: Week 4 Day B
sessions.focus: Peak pre-marathon strength block — Bulgarian split squat PR

weeks.theme: Taper Week 1 — maintain loads, reduce volume

sessions.label: Week 5 Day A
sessions.focus: Pre-marathon taper — maintenance loads, reduce sets

sessions.label: Week 5 Day B
sessions.focus: Final strength session before race week

sessions.label: Week 6 Day A
sessions.focus: Race week — active recovery and mobility only

sessions.label: Week 6 Day B
sessions.focus: Rest and race preparation — no loading

weeks.theme: Post-Marathon Recovery — tissue quality and movement

sessions.label: Week 7 Day A
sessions.focus: Post-marathon recovery — light movement and foam rolling

sessions.label: Week 7 Day B
sessions.focus: Recovery continued — introduce gentle bodyweight patterns

sessions.label: Week 8 Day B
sessions.focus: Full bilateral session + set next training block goals
